---
title: "Pattern Making Studies"
subtitle: "A Parametric Approach to Flat Pattern Drafting with R"
author: "Helena R. S. D'Espindula"
date: "version of `r format(Sys.time(), '%d de %B de %Y as %R [tz = %z]')`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(tinytex.verbose = TRUE)
source("Rscripts/install_packages.R")
source("Rscripts/common.R")
```

\frontmatter

```{r child="README.md"}
```

\mainmatter
